title: pothos scandens var. zollingerianus
intro: Pothos scandens var. zollingerianus, commonly known as the Manjula pothos, is a rare and exotic variety of the Epipremnum genus, characterized by its beautiful and delicate white or greenish-yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel mosquitoes and other insects, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat fever and other ailments. The Manjula pothos is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving air quality, and promoting a sense of well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
